title: Automatic Elytra
description: A client side mod that will equip and unequip the elytra (or switch with a chestplate if any) when you want to start gliding (double jump).
body: # Automatic Elytra Automatic Elytra is a client side mod that will equip and unequip their elytra for them. The player simply has to have an elytra in their inventory and when they try to fly it will be equiped. The chestplate that was swapped out with the elytra will be re-equiped when the player touches the ground or water. ![Demo of Automatic Elytra swapping with a chestplate](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kregerl/Automatic-Elytra/refs/heads/master/giphy.gif) Note: This mod may be considered a cheat to some people / servers. Use at your own risk, I am not responsible for anyone getting banned for using this mod. --- This is a fork of Areuthreateningme's implementation of the mod, as the original hasn't received any updates for several years. I won't be doing backports, only updates when new versions of MC come out, and minor fixes in these, not in the previous ones. [Here is the link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/automatic-elytra) to Areuthreateningme's original mod page on CurseForge.
